commit.message:
feat: Phase 3 — Dynamic frontend driven by pathway config

- App.tsx: Dynamic ModuleRouter with lazy-loaded component registry,
  replacing individual hardcoded project routes with /:moduleSlug/:projectId
- Sidebar: Project nav items now driven by active pathway's modules
  from pathwayStore, with fallback to software_product defaults
- StagesStepper: Accepts optional stages prop from pathway config
- DesignSheetPanel: Accepts optional fieldConfigs prop, resolves values
  from named columns or fields_data JSONB
- Discovery: Wired to pathwayStore — fetches project, activates pathway,
  passes stages and sheet field configs to child components
- Home: Pathway picker UI (shown when multiple pathways exist),
  dynamic creation fields and presets from active pathway,
  sends pathway_id with project creation

All existing software_product behavior preserved — zero breaking changes.
Vite build passes clean with proper code splitting per module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Fix remaining aria attributes and semantic structure

https://claude.ai/code/session_012XVbDs5RUJVmBGL24pSc2i

commit.message:
Fix invalid colspan/rowspan="0" in Fachinfo table rendering

When table cells lacked explicit colspan/rowspan attributes, the parser
set them to 0 (nil.to_i) instead of keeping the model default of 1.
This produced invalid HTML causing broken table layouts. Also updated
the view to only emit colspan/rowspan when > 1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[Explorer] Add epoch information page with key generation status tracking (#249) ## Summary This PR adds a new epoch information page to the explorer that displays current and staged epoch details, along with a historical view of epoch rollovers and their associated key generation status. ## Screenshots ## Key Changes ### New Pages & Components - **New `/epoch` route** with `EpochPage` component displaying: - Current active epoch and staged epoch cards with group IDs - Historical epoch rollover list with expandable details - "Load more" pagination for rollover history - **New epoch-related components**: - `EpochCard`: Displays epoch number, group ID, and optional rollover block - `EpochRolloverItem`: Shows epoch transition with expandable key generation details - `KeyGenStatusItem`: Displays key generation progress with validator participation lists ### New Hooks - `useEpochsState`: Fetches current/staged epoch state and group IDs - `useEpochRolloverHistory`: Manages paginated loading of epoch rollover events with cursor-based pagination - `useKeyGenDetails`: Fetches and tracks key generation status for a specific epoch ### Core Library Functions - **`loadEpochsState`**: Reads current epoch state including previous, active, staged epochs and rollover block - **`loadEpochGroupId`**: Retrieves group ID for a specific epoch - **`loadEpochRolloverHistory`**: Fetches `EpochStaged` events with pagination support - **`loadKeyGenDetails`**: Analyzes key generation events (committed, shared, confirmed, complained) to determine status (started, committing, sharing, confirming, finalized, or compromised) ### Shared Components - Extracted `ValidatorList` component to `@/components/common/ValidatorList.tsx` for reuse across transaction and epoch pages - Updated `SafeTxAttestationStatus` to use the shared `ValidatorList` component ### Contract Integration - Added `getEpochsState()` and `getEpochGroupId()` function calls to consensus contract ABI - Added `EpochProposed` and `EpochStaged` event definitions to consensus ABI - Added key generation event selectors (`COORDINATOR_KEY_GEN_SELECTORS`) for filtering coordinator events ### Settings & Utilities - Added `blocksPerEpoch` setting for computing key generation start blocks - Enhanced `getFromBlock` utility to accept optional `referenceBlock` parameter for flexible block range calculations ## Implementation Details - Key generation status is determined by analyzing event logs: if not compromised and confirmed count ≥ threshold, it's finalized - Epoch rollover history uses cursor-based pagination, fetching backward in time with `maxBlockRange` windows - Auto-refetch is disabled for finalized/compromised key generation states - Validator participation is displayed with visual indicators (✅ for confirmed, ⏳ for pending, ❌ for failed) https://claude.ai/code/session_01QAnNwPH2mpD5x29XccHc3x --------- Co-authored-by: Claude

ci: replace appleboy/ssh-action with native SSH client

appleboy/ssh-action has a fragile PEM parser that fails on valid ed25519 keys.
Using ubuntu runner's native openssh-client which handles ed25519 reliably.

Key changes:
- Write SSH key via env var (not inline secret) to avoid shell escaping issues
- ssh-keyscan handles host key verification
- Direct ssh command with explicit key path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: embed libtdjson.dylib and preserve symlinks in macOS release

The macOS release was broken due to two issues:
1. zip destroyed framework symlinks (Versions/Current -> A), corrupting bundles
2. libtdjson.dylib was not embedded in the app, with rpath pointing to CI build dir

Fix uses ditto for symlink-preserving zip and copies the dylib into Frameworks/.

commit.message:
fix: Force zh-TW locale on root pages to prevent Googlebot duplicate content

Root pages lacked localStorage.setItem('site_lang', 'zh-TW') before
i18n.js, causing Googlebot (English browser) to render them in English
via navigator.language detection. This made root pages identical to /en/
pages — Google saw duplicate content and refused to index them.

Fix: Add explicit zh-TW localStorage set on all 8 root pages, and
remove navigator.language auto-detection from i18n.js (URL path is
now the sole language source of truth).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(OCR): S3 bucket undefined, PDF multi-page support, proper error logging

Root cause: ocrService.js used S3_BUCKET_NAME env var which doesn't exist.
Actual env var is S3_BUCKET / AWS_S3_BUCKET. S3 PutObject failed with an
unhelpful empty error object because Bucket was undefined.

Fixes:
- ocrService: use S3_BUCKET || AWS_S3_BUCKET || 'tulipglobal.org' (matches
  lib/s3Upload.js and archiveService.js)
- ocrService: add async Textract path (StartDocumentAnalysis +
  GetDocumentAnalysis polling) for multi-page PDFs — AnalyzeDocument only
  works on single-page docs
- ocrRoutes: log err.message + err.stack instead of raw err object (which
  serialises as {} for AWS SDK errors)
- ocrRoutes: fix S3_BUCKET_NAME in /pdf presigned URL endpoint
- ocrRoutes: add structured logging at each pipeline step

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(dex-liquidity): extract price observations before dedup in staging merge and DS fallback

DL yields pools provide pool metrics (TVL, volume) but never prices.
When CG/GT staged pools or DexScreener fallback pairs fingerprint-match
DL pools, the dedup correctly prevents double-counting TVL in
dex_liquidity but was also dropping their price observations — leaving
48% of tracked stablecoins without a dex_prices row despite having
discoverable DEX pools.

Move price observation extraction above the dedup `continue` in both
mergeStagedPools and fetchDsFallbackPools. Pool metrics dedup is
unchanged; only price data is rescued.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
